span.p: Component View: Browser Memory Daemon - WSL Loopback HTTP Daemon

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;
display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.div:
Reads only legacy text
sidecars and checks media
files through

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.div:
Reads, stats, reconciles, and
deletes legacy text sidecars
in

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.div:
Stages, commits, reads,
stats, and deletes media
blobs in

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.div:
Stages, commits, reads,
stats, and deletes spooled
media in

div.style: color: rgb(0, 0, 0) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.div:
Matches immutable method/path
descriptors with static
precedence, maps typed
compatible errors without
leaking internal details,
routes loopback API requests,
serves UI assets, enforces
bearer auth for memory/admin
APIs, and applies CORS for
allowed origins.

div.style: color: rgb(0, 0, 0) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.div:
Prefers root-relative
locators with contained
legacy fallback; streams
unique stages with size/hash
accounting; atomically
commits; and contains blob
read, stat, and delete
operations.

div.style: color: rgb(0, 0, 0) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.div:
Provides exact FTS search
plus SQLite-authoritative
text detail and
observation-first
recent/timeline/document/snapshot/media
views with explicit legacy
fallbacks.

div.style: color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.div:
Durable complete
cleaned-text, relational, and
full-text authority for
migration ledger, sources,
documents, visits, capture
observations, URL claims,
visit events, snapshots,
chunks, chunks_fts, media
provenance/tasks, blob
lifecycle records, policy
rules, audit events, and
deletion receipts.

div.style: color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.div:
Reconstructible compatibility
evidence such as
pre-version-9 clean-text
sidecars; new captures create
no text sidecars.

div.style: color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.div:
Bounded disposable
image/video/audio bytes under
the configured media root;
explicit external roots
require mount and
identity-marker proof before
access.

div.style: color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.div:
Opt-in durable outage buffer
beneath the local WSL data
root; admission counts
committed files and distinct
in-flight SQLite
reservations, and drain
verifies bytes before tier
transition/source cleanup.
